name: stylus_block_92520165_delegatecall_chain
description: Replays Sepolia block 92,520,165 tx 0xf1730d62 — an EIP-1559 tx from EOA 0x2b76dae4 to ERC-1967 proxy 0x9af58f1f that DELEGATECALLs through 5 chained Stylus modular-wallet contracts. Canonical receipt: status=0 (revert), gasUsed=2050382. arbreth currently consumes ~27.7k more gas at this block: the impl Stylus is invoked with ~132k less forwarded gas than canon (the full block's tx[1] context isn't replayed here, so the reproduction shows a smaller delta than the +39,999 observed on the live arbreth node). The chain runs through 0xf1d5554796 → 0xbb84ed229e → STATIC into 0xc18318d984/0x4629d70093 then DELEGATECALL into 0xbb02bdd227, where the second invocation OOGs — propagating Failure back up to the proxy. The bug is upstream of the dispatch chain.
